clean_plant_waterer:
<system name="fw_src_design" ir_version="0.1">
  <metadata>
    <title>Firmware source fixture</title>
  </metadata>
  <nets>
    <net id="gnd" role="ground"/>
    <net id="bat" role="power" nominal_voltage="3.7V"/>
    <net id="v3v3" role="power" nominal_voltage="3.3V"/>
    <net id="sense" role="analog_signal"/>
    <net id="pump" role="digital_signal"/>
  </nets>
  <components>
    <component id="R_DIV" type="resistor">
      <value>100k</value>
      <pin name="1" net="bat"/>
      <pin name="2" net="sense"/>
    </component>
    <component id="R_BOT" type="resistor">
      <value>100k</value>
      <pin name="1" net="sense"/>
      <pin name="2" net="gnd"/>
    </component>
    <component id="U_REG" type="ldo" part="generic_ldo_3v3">
      <pin name="in" net="bat"/>
      <pin name="out" net="v3v3"/>
      <pin name="gnd" net="gnd"/>
      <property name="vout" value="3.3V"/>
      <property name="iout_max" value="700mA"/>
      <property name="v_dropout" value="200mV"/>
      <property name="iq" value="10uA"/>
    </component>
    <component id="U_MCU" type="mcu" part="ESP32-C3">
      <pin name="3V3" net="v3v3"/>
      <pin name="GND" net="gnd"/>
      <pin name="GPIO4" net="sense" function="ADC1_CH4"/>
      <pin name="GPIO5" net="pump" function="GPIO_OUT"/>
    </component>
  </components>
  <firmware mcu="U_MCU" language="micropython" entry="main" pins="GPIO4,GPIO5">
    <source><![CDATA[
from machine import ADC, Pin
import time
adc = ADC(Pin(4))
pump = Pin(5, Pin.OUT)
while True:
    mv = adc.read_u16() * 3300 // 65535
    if mv < 1200:
        pump.value(1)
    else:
        pump.value(0)
    time.sleep_ms(100)
]]></source>
  </firmware>
  <tests>
    <test id="t_sense">
      <setup>
        <set_voltage net="bat" value="3.7V"/>
      </setup>
      <run duration="100ms"/>
      <assert_voltage net="sense" min="1.7V" max="1.9V"/>
    </test>
  </tests>
  <simulation_profiles>
    <profile id="analog_only" default="true">
      <backend type="ngspice"/>
      <run test="t_sense"/>
    </profile>
  </simulation_profiles>
</system>

      <pin name="GND" net="gnd"/>
      <pin name="GPIO4" net="sense" function="ADC1_CH4"/>
      <pin name="GPIO5" net="pump" function="GPIO_OUT"/>
    </component>
  </components>
  <firmware mcu="U_NOPE" language="micropython" entry="main" pins="GPIO4,GPIO5">
    <source><![CDATA[
from machine import ADC, Pin
import time
adc = ADC(Pin(4))
pump = Pin(5, Pin.OUT)
while True:
    mv = adc.read_u16() * 3300 // 65535
    if mv < 1200:
        pump.value(1)
    else:
        pump.value(0)
    time.sleep_ms(100)
]]></source>
  </firmware>
  <tests>
    <test id="t_sense">
      <setup>
        <set_voltage net="bat" value="3.7V"/>

  <simulation_profiles>

      <backend type="ngspice"/>

</system>

<system name="fw_src_design" ir_version="0.1">
  <metadata>
    <title>Firmware source fixture</title>
  </metadata>
  <nets>
    <net id="gnd" role="ground"/>
    <net id="bat" role="power" nominal_voltage="3.7V"/>
    <net id="v3v3" role="power" nominal_voltage="3.3V"/>
    <net id="sense" role="analog_signal"/>
    <net id="pump" role="digital_signal"/>
  </nets>
  <components>
    <component id="R_DIV" type="resistor">
      <value>100k</value>
      <pin name="1" net="bat"/>
      <pin name="2" net="sense"/>
    </component>
    <component id="R_BOT" type="resistor">
      <value>100k</value>
      <pin name="1" net="sense"/>
      <pin name="2" net="gnd"/>
    </component>
    <component id="U_REG" type="ldo" part="generic_ldo_3v3">
      <pin name="in" net="bat"/>
      <pin name="out" net="v3v3"/>
      <pin name="gnd" net="gnd"/>
      <property name="vout" value="3.3V"/>
      <property name="iout_max" value="700mA"/>
      <property name="v_dropout" value="200mV"/>
      <property name="iq" value="10uA"/>
    </component>
    <component id="U_MCU" type="mcu" part="ESP32-C3">
      <pin name="3V3" net="v3v3"/>
      <pin name="GND" net="gnd"/>
      <pin name="GPIO4" net="sense" function="ADC1_CH4"/>
      <pin name="GPIO5" net="pump" function="GPIO_OUT"/>
    </component>
  </components>
  <firmware mcu="U_MCU" language="micropython" entry="main" pins="GPIO4,GPIO5">
    <source><![CDATA[
# marker ]]]]><![CDATA[> end
x = 1	y = 2  

if a < b & c:
    print('µV °C →')
]]></source>
  </firmware>
  <tests>
    <test id="t_sense">
      <setup>
        <set_voltage net="bat" value="3.7V"/>
      </setup>
      <run duration="100ms"/>
      <assert_voltage net="sense" min="1.7V" max="1.9V"/>
    </test>
  </tests>
  <simulation_profiles>
    <profile id="analog_only" default="true">
      <backend type="ngspice"/>
      <run test="t_sense"/>
    </profile>
  </simulation_profiles>
</system>
